title: Create: Adventurous Engineering
description: An updated version of Create: Adventurous Engineering, now featuring Create 6.0 addons.
body:
A work in progress modpack featuring NeoForge Create 0.6 addons and a few terrain generation, decoration and transportation mods.

This project is made as a Create 6.0 and NeoForge version of [Create: Adventurous Engineering] (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/create-adventurous-engineering)



Examples of create addons included:

Create Crafts & Additions - Adds electricity and electric motors to Create
Create: New Age - Similar to Crafts & Additions, adds electricity, but also adds the Boiler Heater, an alternative to the Blaze Burner
Create: Better Villager - Adds Create based villager professions, like the Andesite Worker, Brass Worker and Miner professions
Create: Dreams n' Desires - Adds QoL items to Create
Create: Escalated - Adds functional escalators to Create



Examples of terrain generation, decoration and transportation mods included:

Terralith - Terralith adds new biomes and caves to the Overworld
Regions Unexplored - Similar to Terralith, this mod adds new biomes to the Overworld and the Nether
BetterNether and BetterEnd - These 2 mods add new biomes, creatures and more to the Nether and to the End
Ammendments and Supplementaries - These 2 mods add decorations, QoL features and more

A NeoForge and Create 6.0 version of [Create: Adventurous Engineering](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/create-adventurous-engineering)
